revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Monthly clean-up category/core
 | type       = {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{{type}}}|{{#ifeq:{{First word|{{{name part}}}}}|Wikipedia|{{{name part}}}|{{lcfirst:{{{name part}}}}}}}}}
 | toc        = {{{toc}}}
 | year       = {{{year}}}
 | monthno    = {{{monthno}}}
 | month name = {{{month name|0}}}
 | name part  = {{{name part}}}
 | cat        = {{#if:{{{cat|}}}|{{{cat}}}|{{{name part}}}}}
 | hidden     = {{{hidden}}}
 | message    = {{{message|}}}
 | datecat    = {{{datecat|}}}
 | clean-up   = {{{clean-up|}}}
}}</includeonly>

<includeonly>{{Monthly clean-up category/core
 | type       = {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{{type}}}|{{#ifeq:{{First word|{{{name part}}}}}|Wikipedia|{{{name part}}}|{{lcfirst:{{{name part}}}}}}}}}
 | toc        = {{{toc}}}
 | year       = {{{year}}}
 | monthno    = {{{monthno}}}
 | month name = {{{month name|0}}}
 | name part  = {{{name part}}}
 | cat        = {{#if:{{{cat|}}}|{{{cat}}}|{{{name part}}}}}
 | hidden     = {{{hidden}}}
 | message    = {{{message|}}}
 | datecat    = {{{datecat|}}}
 | clean-up   = {{{clean-up|}}}
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Monthly clean-up category/core
 | type       = {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{{type}}}|{{#ifeq:{{First word|{{{name part}}}}}|Wikipedia|{{{name part}}}|{{lcfirst:{{{name part}}}}}}}}}
 | toc        = {{{toc}}}
 | year       = {{{year}}}
 | monthno    = {{{monthno}}}
 | month name = {{{month name|0}}}
 | name part  = {{{name part}}}
 | cat        = {{#if:{{{cat|}}}|{{{cat}}}|{{{name part}}}}}
 | hidden     = {{{hidden}}}
 | message    = {{{message|}}}
 | datecat    = {{{datecat|}}}
 | clean-up   = {{{clean-up|}}}
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Monthly clean-up category/core
 | type       = {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{{type}}}|{{#ifeq:{{First word|{{{name part}}}}}|Wikipedia|{{{name part}}}|{{lcfirst:{{{name part}}}}}}}}}
 | toc        = {{{toc}}}

 | month name = {{{month name|0}}}
 | name part  = {{{name part}}}
 | cat        = {{#if:{{{cat|}}}|{{{cat}}}|{{{name part}}}}}
 | hidden     = {{{hidden}}}
 | message    = {{{message|}}}
 | datecat    = {{{datecat|}}}
 | clean-up   = {{{clean-up|}}}
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Monthly clean-up category/core
 | type       = {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{{type}}}|{{#ifeq:{{First word|{{{name part}}}}}|Wikipedia|{{{name part}}}|{{lcfirst:{{{name part}}}}}}}}}
 | toc        = {{{toc}}}
 | year       = {{{year}}}
 | monthno    = {{{monthno}}}
 | month name = {{{month name|0}}}
 | name part  = {{{name part}}}
 | cat        = {{#if:{{{cat|}}}|{{{cat}}}|{{{name part}}}}}
 | hidden     = {{{hidden}}}
 | message    = {{{message|}}}
 | datecat    = {{{datecat|}}}
 | clean-up   = {{{clean-up|}}}
}}</includeonly>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Monthly clean-up category/core
 | type       = {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{{type}}}|{{#ifeq:{{First word|{{{name part}}}}}|Wikipedia|{{{name part}}}|{{lcfirst:{{{name part}}}}}}}}}
 | toc        = {{{toc}}}
 | year       = {{{year}}}
 | monthno    = {{{monthno}}}
 | month name = {{{month name|0}}}
 | name part  = {{{name part}}}
 | cat        = {{#if:{{{cat|}}}|{{{cat}}}|{{{name part}}}}}
 | hidden     = {{{hidden}}}
 | message    = {{{message|}}}
 | datecat    = {{{datecat|}}}
 | clean-up   = {{{clean-up|}}}
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
